title: Users
name: Name
reseller_required_for_customer: Pick a reseller to link this customer to
smtp_missing_warning: No SMTP server (email sending) is set up for this organization yet. Without SMTP, invitation emails can't be sent — so inviting users is disabled.
invitation_expired: This invitation has expired. Send a new one.
status_active_description: This person has an active user account and can sign in.
status_pending_approval_description: This person has accepted the invitation but still needs admin approval.
status_pending_invitation_description: An invitation email has been sent. Waiting for the recipient to accept it.
status_inactive_description: This user account is deactivated and cannot sign in.
status_no_user_description: No user account is linked. You can send an invitation to create one.
